# TAXI Antonio (taxisibenik.hr)

> Licensed private taxi and transfer service based in Šibenik, Croatia, run by one local driver, Antonio Šakić. Fixed-price, door-to-door airport transfers, city-to-city transfers, day trips and local taxi rides across Dalmatia in a comfortable Škoda Superb for up to 4 passengers. Every fare is agreed in advance, with no meter. Phone/WhatsApp: +385 99 447 1013. Email: info@taxisibenik.hr.

## Key facts

- One driver, one car: Antonio Šakić, a Škoda Superb seating up to 4 passengers with luggage. Antonio speaks Croatian and English.
- Fixed prices per car (not per person), agreed before travel. A 20% advance payment (minimum €20) confirms a booking; the balance is paid on the day in cash or by card.
- Bookings need at least 2 hours' notice.
- Serves Šibenik and the wider Dalmatian coast and interior, and all four regional airports: Split (SPU), Zadar (ZAD), Zagreb (ZAG) and Dubrovnik (DBV). Airport transfers cover both the commercial terminals and the private/general-aviation terminals used for private jets and charter flights.
- For larger groups or a van, Antonio arranges it through a hand-picked network of trusted local drivers, staying the single point of contact.

## Languages

The whole site is published in 11 languages. English is served at the root; each other language lives under its own prefix with localized slugs: Croatian /hr/, German /de/, Polish /pl/, Czech /cs/, Italian /it/, French /fr/, Dutch /nl/, Slovenian /sl/, Hungarian /hu/, Slovak /sk/. Every page links to its alternates via hreflang.

## Main pages

- [Taxi Šibenik (home)](https://taxisibenik.hr/): Local taxi and transfers across Šibenik and the region.
- [Airport Transfers](https://taxisibenik.hr/airport-transfers-from-sibenik/): Fixed-price transfers to and from Split, Zadar, Zagreb and Dubrovnik airports, commercial and private terminals, with flight monitoring.
- [City-to-City Transfers](https://taxisibenik.hr/sibenik-transfers/): Private transfers between Šibenik and cities across Dalmatia (Split, Zadar, Dubrovnik, Zagreb, Trogir and more).
- [Day Trips](https://taxisibenik.hr/daytrips/): Private round-trip day trips to Krka National Park and Plitvice Lakes.
- [About Antonio](https://taxisibenik.hr/about/): The driver, the car and how the one-person service works.
- [Book a Transfer](https://taxisibenik.hr/book/): Booking form with a prefilled trip summary and fixed price.
- [Contact](https://taxisibenik.hr/contact/): Phone, WhatsApp and email.
- [FAQ](https://taxisibenik.hr/frequently-asked-questions/): Answers on booking, pricing, payments and local trips.

## Hotel and marina transfers

Dedicated transfer pages for the main Šibenik hotels and marinas: Amadria Park (https://taxisibenik.hr/amadria-park-sibenik-transfers/), D-Resort (https://taxisibenik.hr/d-resort-sibenik-transfers/), Bellevue (https://taxisibenik.hr/bellevue-sibenik-transfers/), D-Marin Marina Mandalina (https://taxisibenik.hr/d-marin-mandalina-transfers/) and Marina Zaton (https://taxisibenik.hr/marina-zaton-transfers/). Many more marinas along the coast (Trogir, Rogoznica, Primošten, Vodice, Tribunj, Murter and others) are bookable as fixed-price transfer destinations.

## Popular day trips

- [Day Trip to Krka from Šibenik](https://taxisibenik.hr/day-trip-krka-national-park-sibenik/): Private round-trip transfer to the Krka waterfalls.
- [Day Trip to Plitvice from Šibenik](https://taxisibenik.hr/day-trip-plitvice-lakes-national-park-sibenik/): Private round-trip transfer to Plitvice Lakes.

## Routes

Individual fixed-price route pages exist for hundreds of specific journeys, one per direction, following the pattern https://taxisibenik.hr/taxi-<from>-to-<to>/ (for example, https://taxisibenik.hr/taxi-sibenik-to-split-airport/). Each lists the fixed fare and lets visitors book directly. Localized language versions follow each language's own slug pattern.

## Service area towns

Local taxi pages cover Šibenik and the surrounding towns, following the pattern https://taxisibenik.hr/taxi-<town>/ (Bilice, Brodarica, Jadrija, Zablaće, Žaborić, Srima, Vodice, Tromilja, Lozovac, Perković, Grebaštica, Bilo, Drniš, Knin, and more).

## Sister site

Skradin-based transfers are handled by [taxiskradin.hr](https://taxiskradin.hr/), run by the same driver.
